title: Fix MongoDB Pipeline to Handle Optional Fields with Mixed Types and Nested Fields

statement.markdown: Write a MongoDB aggregation pipeline that takes a collection of user documents and returns a new collection with the following fields: `name` (string), `age` (number), and `address` (object with `street` and `city` fields). The `age` field should be calculated only if it is present in the original document. The `address` field should be created only if the `address` field is present in the original document, and it should contain the `street` and `city` fields. If the `address` field is not present, the `street` and `city` fields should be set to `null`.
statement.inputFormat: Collection of user documents as JSON
statement.outputFormat: New collection with the required fields
statement.notes: The pipeline should handle optional fields with mixed types and nested fields.

constraints.description: Minimum number of documents in the input collection

examples.explanation: Example input with all required fields
Example input with only the `address` field

hints.text: Use the `$cond` operator to calculate the `age` field only if it is present in the original document.
Use the `$ifNull` operator to set the `street` and `city` fields to `null` if the `address` field is not present in the original document.

editorial.title: Editorial Solution
editorial.intuition: The pipeline should use the `$cond` operator to calculate the `age` field only if it is present in the original document, and the `$ifNull` operator to set the `street` and `city` fields to `null` if the `address` field is not present.
editorial.bruteForce: One possible approach is to use multiple `$project` stages to calculate the `age` field and create the `address` field separately.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution uses a single `$project` stage with multiple expressions to calculate the required fields.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The solution correctly handles optional fields with mixed types and nested fields.
commonMistakes: Not using the `$cond` operator to calculate the `age` field
Not using the `$ifNull` operator to set the `street` and `city` fields to `null`
